storyBeat: 戰爭結束 — Odysseus 是個勇敢的國王

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Tonight's story has a few new words. Let's learn them first!
questions.sentenceZh: 今晚的故事會用到幾個新字，我們先把它們學會！
questions.explanationZh: 奶奶說：今晚要講奧德修斯航海回家的故事，先來認識幾個關鍵字，記住了故事更好聽喔！

questions.sentence: Match each Chinese word to its English.
questions.explanationZh:
這四個字都在奧德修斯的故事裡：
🔑 sea = 海
🔑 ship = 船
🔑 hero = 英雄
🔑 home = 家

questions.sentence: Match each Chinese word to its English.
questions.explanationZh:
再來四個：
🔑 island = 島
🔑 giant = 巨人
🔑 wind = 風
🔑 sail = 帆

questions.sentence: Which one is a ship?
questions.question: Which one is a ship?
questions.explanationZh: 船的英文是 ship ⛵！奧德修斯就是坐著船要回家的。

questions.sentence: Which one shows a giant?
questions.question: Which one shows a giant?
questions.explanationZh: giant = 巨人 🗿！故事裡有一個住在洞穴裡的可怕巨人。

questions.sentence: The hero sailed across the wide sea.
questions.sentenceZh: 英雄划著船穿越寬廣的大海。
questions.question: Which picture matches the sentence?
options: a hero sitting by a fire in a cave
a hero riding a horse on a road
a hero walking through a green forest
a hero on a ship crossing open water
optionsZh: 英雄在船上越過開闊的水面
questions.explanationZh: sea = 海，ship = 船，hero = 英雄——句子說英雄坐船穿越大海，第四張圖最符合！

storyBeat: 他想念家人 — 妻子 Penelope 跟兒子 Telemachus

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: A few more words to learn — then the story begins!
questions.sentenceZh: 再記幾個字，故事就要開始了！
questions.explanationZh: 奶奶說：再學幾個重要的字，學會了，故事就更好懂囉！

questions.sentence: Match each Chinese phrase to its English.
questions.explanationZh:
這四個片語都出現在奧德修斯的故事裡：
🔑 go home = 回家
🔑 dark cave = 黑暗洞穴
🔑 sea monster = 海怪
🔑 set sail = 揚帆出發

questions.sentence: Odysseus hid inside a dark cave.
questions.sentenceZh: 奧德修斯躲在一個黑暗的洞穴裡。
questions.question: Which picture matches 'a dark cave'?
options: a bright field with tall green trees
a small ship on a calm blue sea
a dark hollow space deep in a rock
a warm house on a quiet island
optionsZh: 有高大綠樹的明亮田野
深藏在岩石裡的黑暗空間
questions.explanationZh: cave = 洞穴，dark = 黑暗——「深藏在岩石裡的黑暗空間」就是洞穴的樣子！

questions.sentence: Which one shows a monster?
questions.question: Which one shows a monster?
questions.explanationZh: monster = 怪獸 👻！故事裡的海怪（sea monster）住在大海裡，很可怕。

questions.sentence: Every morning Odysseus ___ at the wide sea.
questions.sentenceZh: 每天早上，奧德修斯從他的船上___著大海。
questions.question: Choose the correct verb form.
questions.explanationZh: 這是過去的故事，加上「every morning」描述的是那段時間的習慣動作，用過去式 looked！

questions.sentence: Match each Chinese word to its English.
questions.explanationZh:
複習今晚學過的字：
🔑 cave = 洞穴
🔑 monster = 怪獸
🔑 hero = 英雄
🔑 island = 島
準備好聽故事了！

storyBeat: 他想回家鄉 Ithaca — 那是一座小島

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚 4 個字：
🔑 island = 島
🔑 sea = 海
🔑 hill = 山丘
🔑 return = 回去
家鄉在那裡等著他。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Odysseus's home was a small island called Ithaca.
questions.explanationZh: Odysseus 的家是一座小島，叫 Ithaca——在希臘的海上，安靜又美麗。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Ithaca was far from Troy, across a wide blue sea.
questions.question: How far was Ithaca from Troy?
questions.explanationZh: Ithaca 在很遠的地方，隔著一片寬寬的藍色大海——「在海的另一邊很遠」就是答案。
questions.sentenceZh: 伊薩卡在特洛伊很遠的地方，要穿過一片寬闊的藍色大海。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: On the island, white houses sat between green hills and a quiet shore.
questions.questionEn: Was Ithaca a peaceful kind of place?
questions.explanationZh: 白色的房子、綠色的山丘、安靜的海岸——這樣的地方，當然是「安靜的地方」，答 Yes。
questions.sentenceZh: 島上，白色的房子坐落在青山和寧靜的海岸之間。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Odysseus could almost see Ithaca's rocks and trees inside his head.
questions.explanationZh: 他彷彿能在腦中看見 Ithaca 的石頭和樹——思念到可以在眼前幻化出畫面。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He longed to walk on its warm sand and touch its old stone walls.
questions.question: What did Odysseus want to do on Ithaca?
options: build a brand new city by the sea
sell it to another king for gold
leave it forever and sail far away
feel the beach and the old stone
optionsZh: 在海邊建一座全新的城
把它賣給另一個國王換金子
永遠離開它, 航向遠方
踩它的沙子, 摸它的牆
questions.explanationZh: 「我想踩它的沙子，摸它的牆。」——「踩沙摸牆」就是答案。就是這麼簡單的渴望。
questions.sentenceZh: 他渴望踩在那裡溫暖的沙灘上，摸一摸那裡古老的石牆。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "Ithaca," he said softly, "I will return to you."
questions.explanationZh: 「Ithaca，我會回去找你。」——他對一座島說話，奶奶說，這叫「思鄉到骨子裡」。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Even small things on the island felt big in his memory.
questions.question: What does this tell us about Odysseus?
options: every small thing about home felt important
he had forgotten the island long ago
he was angry at Ithaca and its people
he liked Troy much more than his home
optionsZh: 家鄉每件小事都很重要
他對 Ithaca 和島上的人生氣
他喜歡 Troy 遠勝過自己的家
questions.explanationZh: 連小事都覺得很重要——「家鄉每件小事都重要」就是答案。他沒忘記任何一個細節。
questions.sentenceZh: 就連島上小小的事物，在他的記憶裡都變得好大好大。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He stood up tall and looked toward the sea. The road home would start there.
questions.explanationZh: 他站得高高的，望向大海——「回家的路，從這裡開始。」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What kind of place was Ithaca for Odysseus?
questions.question: What was Ithaca for him?
questions.explanationZh: 安靜的小島，海邊的家——「他安靜的家鄉小島」就是答案。那個 🏝️ 最像 Ithaca。
questions.sentenceZh: 伊薩卡對奧德修斯來說是什麼樣的地方？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He pointed to the ships. "It is time," he said. "We sail today..."
questions.explanationZh: 他指著船說：「時候到了，我們今天出發……」——奶奶說，等了十年的這句話，終於說出口了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Odysseus's home was a small island called Ithaca.
questions.question: What kind of place was Odysseus's home?
options: a large city on a river
questions.explanationZh: 「a small island called Ithaca」——他的家是一座叫 Ithaca 的小島！
questions.sentenceZh: 奧德修斯的家是一座叫做伊薩卡的小島。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: On the island, white houses sat between green hills and a quiet shore.
questions.questionEn: Did Ithaca sound like a noisy, busy place?
questions.explanationZh: 白色房子、綠色山丘、安靜的海岸——完全不吵鬧，答 No！
questions.sentenceZh: 島上，白色的房子坐落在青山和寧靜海岸之間。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the words from tonight's lesson.
questions.explanationZh:
🔑 island = 島
🔑 hill = 山丘
🔑 rock = 石頭
🔑 sand = 沙
伊薩卡的自然風景！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Odysseus could almost see Ithaca's rocks and trees inside his head.
questions.question: What does this tell us about Odysseus?
options: family did not cross his mind at all
most of the island was forgotten now
busy building new ships for himself
he remembered every detail of home
questions.explanationZh: 能在腦中「幾乎看到」石頭和樹——說明他記得家鄉的每一個細節！
questions.sentenceZh: 奧德修斯幾乎能在腦中看見伊薩卡的石頭和樹木。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "Ithaca," he said softly, "I will return to you."
questions.question: Who did Odysseus speak these words to?
questions.explanationZh: 他輕輕對著「Ithaca」說話——他在跟一座島說話，這是對家鄉最深的愛！
questions.sentenceZh: 「伊薩卡，」他輕輕說，「我會回去找你。」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Odysseus was afraid of the long sea road and asked his men to wait longer.
questions.questionEn: Did Odysseus face the sea with hope?
questions.explanationZh: 他站得高高的望向大海——「回家的路從那裡開始」，充滿希望，答 Yes！
questions.sentenceZh: 他站得高高的，望向大海。回家的路，從那裡開始。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What feeling did Ithaca bring to Odysseus?
questions.question: What feeling did home give him?
options: 🤔 not sure if it was real
optionsZh: 不確定這地方是否真實
questions.explanationZh: 在腦中看見、說話給島聽、站起來望向海——這都是「深深的愛和歸屬感」。那個 💚 最合。
questions.sentenceZh: 伊薩卡帶給奧德修斯什麼感受？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Even small things on the island felt big in his memory.
questions.question: What does this tell us about how he remembered home?
options: his memory of Ithaca was getting weak
he only remembered the biggest places
every part of Ithaca was precious to him
the island was too small to think about
optionsZh: 他對伊薩卡的記憶越來越模糊
伊薩卡的每一部分對他都很珍貴
questions.explanationZh: 連小事都在記憶裡變大——表示伊薩卡的每一部分對他都很珍貴！
questions.sentenceZh: 就連島上最小的事物，在他的記憶裡都變得好大好大。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He pointed to the ships. "It is time," he said. "We sail today."
questions.questionEn: Was Odysseus finally ready to begin the journey home?
questions.explanationZh: 「It is time, we sail today」——是時候了，今天啟航，當然已經準備好了，答 Yes！
questions.sentenceZh: 他指著船說：「是時候了，我們今天出發。」

storyBeat: 他帶著船員上船 — 一起出海

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚 4 個字：
🔑 ship = 船
🔑 crew = 船員
🔑 sail = 風帆
🔑 rope = 繩子
出發！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Odysseus and his men walked down to their long wooden ships.
questions.explanationZh: Odysseus 和船員走到那些長長的木船旁邊——每一艘船，都是一個承諾。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The crew tied the ropes and lifted the white sails up high.
questions.question: What did the crew do first?
options: lit a small fire on the deck
sat down to rest in the sun
cooked a hot meal for the king
tied ropes and raised the sails
questions.explanationZh: 他們綁繩子、拉起風帆——「綁繩子，拉起風帆」就是第一步。
questions.sentenceZh: 船員們綁好繩索，把白色的帆高高升起。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Each man took his place at the side of the ship with strong hands ready.
questions.questionEn: Were the men working together?
questions.explanationZh: 每個人各就各位——大家一起合作，答 Yes。這是一個有紀律的船隊。
questions.sentenceZh: 每個人都各就各位，雙手用力握住船舷。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Odysseus stood at the front of the first ship and gave a steady nod.
questions.explanationZh: Odysseus 站在第一艘船的船頭，穩穩地點頭——他不需要大喊，那個點頭就是命令。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Slowly the ships moved away from the land and out into open water.
questions.question: Where did the ships go?
questions.explanationZh: 船慢慢離開陸地，駛向開闊的海面——「出去到開闊的海上」就是答案。
questions.sentenceZh: 船隊慢慢離岸，駛向遼闊的大海。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The wind caught the sails. The ships moved faster, like big quiet birds.
questions.explanationZh: 風鼓進風帆，船跑得更快，像一群安靜的大鳥——這個比喻，奶奶說是詩人寫的。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Behind them, the city of Troy grew small and then was gone.
questions.question: What happened to Troy in their view?
questions.explanationZh: Troy 越來越小，然後消失了——「縮小然後消失」就是答案。那座城慢慢變成記憶。
questions.sentenceZh: 身後，特洛伊城越來越小，最後消失不見。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Odysseus looked forward, not back. His face was set toward home.
questions.explanationZh: 他望著前方，不回頭——臉朝著家的方向。他已經離開了，心在前面。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What did the ships look like as they sailed away?
questions.question: How did the ships look?
questions.explanationZh: 「像安靜的大鳥」——故事就是這樣說的。那個 🦅 就是答案。
questions.sentenceZh: 啟航時，那些船看起來是什麼樣子？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Day one of the long trip home had begun. The sea was kind and bright...
questions.explanationZh: 回家長路的第一天開始了，海溫和又明亮……奶奶說，還不知道前面有什麼，但出發了就是勇敢。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Odysseus and his men walked down to their long wooden ships.
questions.question: What were the ships made of?
questions.explanationZh: 「long wooden ships」——木頭做的長船，答案是「木頭」！
questions.sentenceZh: 奧德修斯和他的人走向那些長長的木船。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Odysseus stood at the front of the first ship and gave a steady nod.
questions.questionEn: Did Odysseus seem calm and in control?
questions.explanationZh: 「steady nod」——平穩地點頭，沒有慌亂，他很冷靜，答 Yes！
questions.sentenceZh: 奧德修斯站在第一艘船的船頭，穩穩地點頭。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the words from tonight's lesson.
questions.explanationZh:
🔑 ship = 船
🔑 sail = 風帆
🔑 rope = 繩子
🔑 front = 前面
準備出發的詞彙！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The wind caught the sails. The ships moved faster, like big quiet birds.
questions.question: How did the ships move when the wind filled the sails?
questions.explanationZh: 「像安靜的大鳥」——順暢而快速，沒有聲音。「順暢又快速地」就是答案！
questions.sentenceZh: 風吹進帆，船跑得更快，像大而安靜的鳥一樣。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Odysseus looked forward, not back. His face was set toward home.
questions.question: What did Odysseus show us by not looking back?
options: he was sad to leave his friends behind
his mind was set only on going home
home was almost forgotten by now
he was happy to stay on the island
questions.explanationZh: 望著前方不回頭——他全心全意朝著家的方向，沒有遲疑！
questions.sentenceZh: 奧德修斯向前看，不回頭。他的臉朝向家的方向。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Behind them, the city of Troy grew small and then was gone.
questions.questionEn: Could the men still see Troy after sailing far away?
questions.explanationZh: Troy 越來越小，最後「消失了」——看不見了，答 No！
questions.sentenceZh: 他們身後，特洛伊城越來越小，最後消失不見。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What is the mood of the crew as they set sail?
questions.question: What is the mood?
questions.explanationZh: 各就各位 + 拉起風帆 + 「像安靜的大鳥」飛走 → 「充滿希望、準備好了」。那個 ⚓ 最合適。
questions.sentenceZh: 船員們啟航時的心情是什麼？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Day one of the long trip home had begun. The sea was kind and bright.
questions.question: How did the sea seem on the first day?
options: frozen and too cold to cross
questions.explanationZh: 「kind and bright」——親切又明亮，感覺很歡迎，第一天的海很溫柔！
questions.sentenceZh: 回家長路的第一天開始了，海溫和又明亮。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The men sat down to rest while Odysseus steered the ship alone.
questions.questionEn: Were all the men in position and ready to work?
questions.explanationZh: 每個人各就各位，雙手用力握住——全部準備好了，答 Yes！
questions.sentenceZh: 每個人都各就各位，雙手有力地握住船舷準備。

questions.sentence: The crew raised the sail.
accept: The crew put up the sail.
questions.explanationZh: raise = 升起；crew = 船員。「升起帆」的英文是 raised the sail，就像他們在故事裡做的那樣！
questions.sentenceZh: 船員們升起了帆。

questions.sentence: He looked forward, not back.
questions.explanationZh: look forward = 向前看；not back = 不回頭。這句話說明 Odysseus 一心朝著家的方向，很有決心！
questions.sentenceZh: 他望著前方，不回頭。

questions.sentence: The wind caught the sails and the ships moved faster.
questions.answer: The wind caught the sails and the ships moved faster.
accept: Wind filled the sails and the ships went faster.
The wind hit the sails and the ships moved faster.
The wind filled the sails and the ships moved faster.
questions.explanationZh: catch the sails = 風進入帆；moved faster = 跑得更快。這是故事裡比喻船像大鳥飛翔的那一刻，很美的句子！
questions.sentenceZh: 風鼓進了帆，船越跑越快。

questions.sentence: Odysseus stood at the front of the first ship and gave a steady nod.
questions.question: Why did Odysseus nod instead of shout an order?
options: He was too cold to open his mouth
His nod showed he was calm and trusted his crew
He had lost his voice in the strong ocean wind
He wanted to keep the plan a secret from everyone
optionsZh: 點頭說明他很冷靜，也信任船員
他的聲音被強烈的海風吹走了
他想對所有人保密計畫
questions.explanationZh: 『steady nod』= 穩穩地點頭。Odysseus 不需要大喊，因為他冷靜自信，而且船員都準備好了、信任他。點頭就夠了——這才是真正有力量的領導者！

storyBeat: 他們航行很多天 — 天空很藍

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚 4 個字：
🔑 sky = 天空
🔑 blue = 藍色
🔑 day = 白天
🔑 star = 星星
幾天都是好天氣。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The ships sailed many days. The sky stayed wide and bright blue.
questions.explanationZh: 好多天，船一直往前走。天空又寬又湛藍——像一片不會結束的藍色布。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: By day the sun was warm. By night the stars came out like soft lights.
questions.question: What lit the sky at night?
options: light from the city of Troy
questions.explanationZh: 晚上，星星冒出來，像一盞一盞的小燈——「星星發出的柔光」就是答案。
questions.sentenceZh: 白天，陽光暖洋洋的；夜晚，星星像柔和的燈一樣亮起來。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The men were quiet and worried as they watched a dark cloud grow far away.
questions.questionEn: Were the men happy at this time?
questions.explanationZh: 船員說說笑笑、拉繩子——「心情好」，答 Yes。這段旅程開始很順。
questions.sentenceZh: 男人們每天早上拉繩子的時候，說說笑笑。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They saw silver fish jumping out of the green-blue water.
questions.explanationZh: 他們看見銀色的魚從海面跳出來——連大海都在歡迎他們。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Odysseus shared bread and fresh water with every man on board.
questions.question: What kind of king was Odysseus?
questions.explanationZh: 他把麵包和清水分給每一個人——「和船員分享食物」就是答案。好國王是這樣的。
questions.sentenceZh: 奧德修斯把麵包和淡水分給船上每一個人。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Each evening they watched the sun fall slowly into the sea.
questions.explanationZh: 每個傍晚，他們看太陽慢慢沉入海裡——這個畫面，奶奶說是「最美的晚餐」。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Day after day the trip felt easy and good.
questions.question: How were the first days at sea?
questions.explanationZh: 一天一天，旅程感覺輕鬆又順利——「輕鬆又順利」就是答案。
questions.sentenceZh: 日復一日，這段旅程感覺輕鬆又美好。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Odysseus felt his heart get lighter with every wave.
questions.explanationZh: 每道海浪，都讓他心情更輕——越來越接近家的感覺。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: How did the sea and sky feel in these days?
questions.question: How did it feel?
questions.explanationZh: 陽光 + 藍天 + 心情輕 → 「明亮又平靜」。那個 ☀️ 就是那幾天的天氣。
questions.sentenceZh: 這幾天的海和天是什麼感覺？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: But far away on the line of the sea, a dark cloud began to grow...
questions.explanationZh: 可是，在遠方的海平線上，一片黑雲開始慢慢長大……奶奶說，美好的事情後面，往往藏著考驗。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The ships sailed many days. The sky stayed wide and bright blue.
questions.question: How was the weather during the early days of sailing?
options: clear and sunny with blue skies
gray and cloudy with cold rain
foggy and dark with no wind
hot and dry with no clouds
questions.explanationZh: 「wide and bright blue sky」——又寬又湛藍的天空，天氣晴朗！
questions.sentenceZh: 船航行了好幾天，天空保持寬闊的亮藍色。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They saw silver fish jumping out of the green-blue water.
questions.questionEn: Did the men see fish in the sea during the voyage?
questions.explanationZh: 他們看見銀色的魚從海面跳出——確實看到了魚，答 Yes！
questions.sentenceZh: 他們看見銀色的魚從藍綠色的水裡跳出來。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the words from tonight's lesson.
questions.explanationZh:
🔑 sky = 天空
🔑 star = 星星
🔑 fish = 魚
🔑 sun = 太陽
美好航行的自然景色！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The men talked and laughed as they pulled the ropes each morning.
questions.question: What does the talking and laughing tell us about the crew?
options: they were angry at their captain
too tired to even pull a rope
not listening to anyone at all
optionsZh: 根本沒在聽任何人說話
questions.explanationZh: 說說笑笑地拉繩子——心情好又合作愉快！「心情好，一起合作」就是答案。
questions.sentenceZh: 每天早上拉繩子的時候，船員們說說笑笑。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Odysseus felt his heart get lighter with every wave.
questions.question: Why did Odysseus feel lighter with each wave?
options: the ship was losing weight from the water
the waves were helping him sleep better
every wave was taking him closer to home
the waves were pushing food off the ship
optionsZh: 每一道浪都讓他更靠近家
questions.explanationZh: 每道浪帶著他往家的方向走——越來越靠近，心情也越來越輕！
questions.sentenceZh: 每道海浪，奧德修斯都覺得心情更輕了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: But far away on the line of the sea, a dark cloud began to grow.
questions.questionEn: Was trouble possibly coming for the ships?
questions.explanationZh: 遠方出現一片越長越大的黑雲——黑雲通常代表麻煩要來了，答 Yes！
questions.sentenceZh: 但是在遠方的海平線上，一片黑雲開始慢慢長大。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What changed at the end of tonight's lesson?
questions.question: What changed at the end?
options: 🐟 a giant fish jumped on board
⛅ a dark cloud appeared far away
questions.explanationZh: 美好的幾天之後，「遠方出現一片烏雲」——奶奶說，好事後面往往藏著考驗。那個 ⛅ 就是答案。
questions.sentenceZh: 今晚故事的最後，發生了什麼變化？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Each evening they watched the sun fall slowly into the sea.
questions.question: What did the men do every evening?
options: counted all the food on board
questions.explanationZh: 「each evening they watched the sun fall into the sea」——每個傍晚，他們一起看日落！
questions.sentenceZh: 每個傍晚，他們都看著太陽慢慢沉入大海。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Odysseus kept the bread and water only for himself on the voyage.
questions.questionEn: Was Odysseus generous with his men?
questions.explanationZh: 他把麵包和清水分給每一個人——非常慷慨，答 Yes！好國王就是這樣的。
questions.sentenceZh: 奧德修斯把麵包和淡水分給船上的每個人。

storyBeat: 大風來了 — 海浪很高

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚 4 個字：
🔑 wind = 風
🔑 wave = 海浪
🔑 tall = 高
🔑 storm = 暴風雨
大風暴來了！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The sky turned dark gray. A big wind came out of nowhere.
questions.explanationZh: 天空變成深灰色，大風不知從哪裡衝過來——就像大自然突然翻臉了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The waves grew tall, taller than the sides of the ships.
questions.question: How tall did the waves get?
options: as small as a little cup
as low as the ship's floor
questions.explanationZh: 海浪越長越高，高過了船舷——「比船舷還高」就是答案。那種浪，很可怕。
questions.sentenceZh: 浪頭越來越高，比船舷還要高。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Cold rain hit their faces and the wood under their feet shook.
questions.questionEn: Was the storm a small one?
questions.explanationZh: 冷雨打臉、船底在抖——這不是小風暴，答 No。是大風暴。
questions.sentenceZh: 冰冷的雨打在他們臉上，腳下的木板不停地搖。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The men held the ropes hard and called to each other through the wind.
questions.explanationZh: 船員緊抓繩子，在風中互喊——大家都在努力不讓船翻。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Some of the men were scared and their hands shook on the wet wood.
questions.question: How did some of the men feel?
options: bored and sleepy on the deck
calm and warm in the sun
questions.explanationZh: 有些人嚇到手在發抖——「害怕，手在抖」就是答案。這種風浪，換誰都怕。
questions.sentenceZh: 一些人嚇壞了，雙手在濕滑的木板上顫抖著。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The sail bent low. The ship tipped from side to side.
questions.explanationZh: 風帆被壓彎，船左右搖晃——像個在大浪裡的玩具。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Odysseus stayed on his feet and grabbed the wheel with both hands.
questions.question: What did Odysseus do during the storm?
options: hid below the deck of the ship
sat down and cried for his home
jumped into the cold dark water
stood and took hold of the wheel
questions.explanationZh: Odysseus 站穩，緊抓船舵——「站著，緊抓船舵」就是答案。他沒躲，沒哭，站著面對。
questions.sentenceZh: 奧德修斯站穩腳步，用雙手緊緊握住船舵。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The sea was loud, but his eyes did not leave the front of the ship.
questions.explanationZh: 海浪聲很大，但他的眼睛沒有離開船頭——這就是領袖該有的樣子。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What kind of weather was hitting the ships?
questions.question: What was the weather like?
questions.explanationZh: 大風 + 高浪 + 冷雨 → 「大暴風雨」。那個 ⛈️ 就是答案。
questions.sentenceZh: 那些船遇上了什麼樣的天氣？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Then he lifted his chin and turned to face all his men...
questions.explanationZh: 他抬起下巴，轉身面對所有船員……奶奶說，這個姿勢，叫做「讓大家放心」。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The sky turned dark gray. A big wind came out of nowhere.
questions.question: What did the dark gray sky warn the sailors about?
options: the night was coming too early
a big storm was on its way
land was nearby on the right
questions.explanationZh: 天空變成深灰色 + 大風突然來——這就是暴風雨要來的警告！
questions.sentenceZh: 天空變成深灰色，大風不知從哪裡衝來。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The men held the ropes hard and called to each other through the wind.
questions.questionEn: Were the men working hard to keep the ship safe?
questions.explanationZh: 緊抓繩子 + 在風中互喊 → 他們努力在保護船，答 Yes！
questions.sentenceZh: 船員們緊緊抓住繩子，在風中互相大喊著。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the storm words from tonight's lesson.
questions.explanationZh:
🔑 wind = 風
🔑 wave = 海浪
🔑 rain = 雨
🔑 storm = 暴風雨
大風暴的四個關鍵字！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The sail bent low. The ship tipped from side to side.
questions.question: What happened to the ship in the storm?
options: it moved so fast it made waves
it stopped still in the middle of the sea
the ship lurched and the sail curved low
it turned around and went back
optionsZh: 它在海中央完全停下來
questions.explanationZh: 「帆被壓彎，船左右搖晃」——「船搖晃，帆被壓低」就是答案！
questions.sentenceZh: 帆被壓低了，船一直左右傾斜。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Odysseus stayed on his feet and grabbed the wheel with both hands.
questions.question: What does Odysseus grabbing the wheel with both hands show?
options: could not remember what he was doing
bored with nothing else to do
already finished and just resting now
strong and refusing to give up
optionsZh: 不記得自己在做什麼了
questions.explanationZh: 站穩 + 雙手緊抓——他在暴風中不放棄，展現出強大和勇氣！
questions.sentenceZh: 奧德修斯站穩腳步，用雙手緊緊抓住船舵。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The sea was loud, but his eyes did not leave the front of the ship.
questions.questionEn: Did Odysseus lose focus during the storm?
questions.explanationZh: 海很吵，但他的眼睛沒有離開船頭——他始終保持專注，答 No！
questions.sentenceZh: 海浪聲很大，但他的眼睛一直沒有離開船頭。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What was Odysseus like during the storm?
questions.question: What was he like?
questions.explanationZh: 站穩 + 抓舵 + 眼睛不離船頭 → 「像石頭一樣穩定」。那個 🪨 最像他的樣子。
questions.sentenceZh: 暴風雨中，奧德修斯是什麼樣的？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Cold rain hit their faces and the wood under their feet shook.
questions.question: What were two things that happened during the storm?
options: warm sun came out and the wind stopped
icy rain fell and the floor trembled
the sail fell off and the rope broke
fish jumped on board and the men cheered
optionsZh: 冷雨打在他們身上，甲板在抖
questions.explanationZh: 「冷雨打臉 + 腳下木板在抖」——答案就是「冷雨打在他們身上，甲板在抖」！
questions.sentenceZh: 冰冷的雨打在他們臉上，腳下的木板不停地顫抖。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The men held the ropes hard and called to each other through the wind.
questions.questionEn: Were all the men feeling brave during the storm?
questions.explanationZh: 有些人嚇到手在發抖——不是每個人都很勇敢，答 No！有些人很害怕。
questions.sentenceZh: 一些人嚇壞了，雙手在濕滑的木板上顫抖著。

storyBeat: 「我們會勇敢, 我們會回家」 — 風暴中的話

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚 4 個字：
🔑 say = 說
🔑 together = 一起
🔑 hope = 希望
🔑 go on = 繼續
最重要的話就在這裡！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Odysseus looked at every man and spoke in a clear, steady voice.
questions.explanationZh: Odysseus 看著每一個人，用清楚、平穩的聲音說話——不是叫，是說。那種平靜，比大聲更有力。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "We will be brave. We will go home," he said.
questions.question: What did Odysseus tell his men?
options: to turn the ships back to Troy
to jump into the cold sea
to be brave and keep going home
questions.explanationZh: 「我們要勇敢，我們要回家。」——「勇敢，繼續回家」就是他說的話。
questions.sentenceZh: 「我們要勇敢，我們要回家。」他說。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His words went into their ears, and their hands grew firm again on the ropes.
questions.questionEn: Did his words help his men?
questions.explanationZh: 他的話進了每個人的耳朵，大家的手變穩了——有幫到，答 Yes。這就是好領袖的話語的力量。
questions.sentenceZh: 他的話傳進他們耳裡，他們握繩子的手又變得有力了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Together they pulled the sail back up. Together they held the ship.
questions.explanationZh: 他們一起把風帆拉回來，一起穩住船——「一起」這個字出現了兩次，不是偶然的。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What made the men strong again was not just hope, but each other.
questions.question: What gave the men their strength back?
options: only the strong wind in the sails
a sweet song from the deep sea
hope and the people next to them
optionsZh: 深海傳來的一首甜美的歌
希望, 還有身邊的人
questions.explanationZh: 「讓大家重新有力量的，不只是希望，還有彼此。」——「希望，還有身邊的人」就是答案。
questions.sentenceZh: 讓他們重新振作的，不只是希望，還有彼此。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Slowly, very slowly, the wind began to soften.
questions.explanationZh: 慢慢地，非常慢地，風開始小了——好像大自然也聽到了他們的決心。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The storm passed, but home was still many long days away.
questions.question: Were they home now?
options: no, they still had a long way
questions.explanationZh: 風暴過了，但家還很遠——「家還很遠」就是答案。路還長，但他們撐過去了。
questions.sentenceZh: 暴風雨過去了，但家鄉還有好多天的路要走。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: But every man on the ship now knew one thing for sure.
questions.explanationZh: 船上每個人現在都知道一件事——奶奶說，這件事很重要，下一節答案揭曉。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What is the main lesson from tonight's story?
questions.question: What does the story teach?
questions.explanationZh: 他們互相支持渡過風暴 → 「一起勇敢」。那個 🤝 就是他們學到的事。
questions.sentenceZh: 今晚的故事，主要想告訴我們什麼？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They would face more big seas, but they would face them together. Home was waiting...
questions.explanationZh: 他們還會遇到更多大海，但他們會一起面對——家在等著……奶奶說，這才是真正的勇氣。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Odysseus looked at every man and spoke in a clear, steady voice.
questions.question: Why did Odysseus speak in a clear, steady voice?
options: because he was angry at the storm
because he was far from the sea
to help calm his men down
to call for help from the shore
questions.explanationZh: 清楚平靜的聲音，讓嚇壞的人冷靜下來——他說話是為了幫助穩定船員的心！
questions.sentenceZh: 奧德修斯看著每一個人，用清楚、平穩的聲音說話。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Together they pulled the sail back up and held the ship steady.
questions.questionEn: Did the men work alone to save the ship?
questions.explanationZh: 「Together」出現了兩次——他們是一起合作的，不是各自為政，答 No！
questions.sentenceZh: 他們一起把帆拉起來，一起穩住了船。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the key words from tonight's lesson.
questions.explanationZh:
🔑 together = 一起
🔑 hope = 希望
🔑 go on = 繼續
🔑 brave = 勇敢
今晚最重要的四個字！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His words went into their ears, and their hands grew firm again on the ropes.
questions.question: What power did Odysseus's words have?
options: telling the men to go to sleep
they stopped the wind and rain
a warm meal for everyone was shared
boosted the men's strength and heart
optionsZh: 提振了大家的力氣和鬥志
questions.explanationZh: 他的話進了耳朵，大家的手又變穩了——話語讓他們「感覺更有力量」！
questions.sentenceZh: 他的話進入他們的耳朵，他們抓繩子的手又變得有力了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The storm passed, but home was still many long days away.
questions.question: Even though the storm ended, what was still true?
options: the trip home was not yet over
all the men were safe at home
a new storm was starting right away
the ship had reached Ithaca already
optionsZh: 新的暴風雨馬上又要來了
questions.explanationZh: 暴風雨過了，「但家還很遠」——回家的旅程還沒結束！
questions.sentenceZh: 暴風雨過去了，但家鄉仍然有好多天的路要走。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What made the men strong again was not just hope, but each other.
questions.questionEn: Did the men get their strength back only from hope alone?
questions.explanationZh: 不只是希望——還有「彼此」，兩者都需要，答 No！
questions.sentenceZh: 讓他們重新振作的，不只是希望，還有彼此的力量。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What is the biggest lesson from the whole Odyssey story?
questions.question: What is the biggest lesson?
options: 💰 always carry treasure for hard times
🤝 face hard times with courage together
🏃 run away when things get difficult
😴 rest and sleep until trouble is over
questions.explanationZh: 整個旅程：互相支持 + 不放棄 + 往家走 → 「一起勇敢面對困難」。那個 🤝 是最重要的答案。
questions.sentenceZh: 整個奧德賽故事，最重要的功課是什麼？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They would face more big seas, but they would face them together.
questions.question: How were Odysseus and his men going to handle future troubles?
options: by asking other ships to lead
facing each challenge as a team
letting the captain make every choice
questions.explanationZh: 「they would face them together」——一起面對！以團隊的方式！
questions.sentenceZh: 他們會遇到更多大海，但他們會一起去面對。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Slowly, very slowly, the wind began to soften.
questions.questionEn: Did the storm end suddenly all at once?
questions.explanationZh: 「慢慢地，非常慢地」——不是突然結束，是慢慢變弱，答 No！
questions.sentenceZh: 慢慢地，非常慢地，風開始柔和起來。
